title: Check if we're empanelled
lead: We work with most major insurers and TPAs. If yours isn't listed, talk to billing and we'll see what can be done.

cashless_strip.title: How cashless treatment works here
steps: Carry your insurance card and a photo ID on the visit.
Our billing team will raise the pre-authorisation request the same day.
Once approved, you focus on treatment — we handle the paperwork.
